summary: Add combinable --out-of-range and --section filters to `export pdf-for-doctor`; filtered set drives the PDF subtitle, summary counts, and JSON envelope.
reason: Doctors want a focused report (only out-of-range, or one section like Heart/Liver), not the full 128-biomarker dump.
validated_outcome: Live: ALL=128, --out-of-range=23, --section Nutrients=26, combined=4, unknown section returns a friendly notFoundErr.
